calculation.description: Z-scored 5-day momentum: 5-day log return standardized by a 63-day rolling mean and standard deviation of 5-day returns.
calculation.formula: r5_t = ln(P_t / P_{t-5}); z_t = (r5_t - mean(r5)_{t-63:t-1}) / std(r5)_{t-63:t-1}; signal_t = clip(z_t, -3, 3)
details: Compute using daily close prices stamped at 00:00 UTC.
Require at least 63 prior observations to form the rolling z-score.
Winsorize (clip) the z-score at +/- 3 to reduce outlier impact.
Missing data or splits are not applicable for BTC-USD; ensure exchange outages are forward-filled with no trade signals on gaps.

regime_definitions.bull_bear: Bull if price > 200-day simple moving average, else Bear.
regime_definitions.volatility: Volatility terciles using 30-day rolling standard deviation of daily returns: low/mid/high.
